message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="4th blocking item: Carson's filter partial swap">
Adding one more — Carson confirms his blocking item is also still open:

4. **Filter links need HTMX attrs for partial swap** — context filter links should use hx-get/hx-target/hx-swap to replace just the action list, not do a full page navigation.

So you have 4 blocking items total:
1. Focus management after complete/delete (Heydon)
2. Visible label for context select (Heydon)
3. Dashboard next actions count hardcoded (Marty)
4. Filter partial swap with HTMX attrs (Carson)

Please address all four this pass.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Something is off. All four of these items are already implemented and committed. Let me verify by checking the actual committed files directly.

FILTER LINKS WITH HTMX ATTRS === hx-get="/next-actions" hx-target="#next-actions-list" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-push-url="true" {% if selected_context.is_none() %}aria-current="true" class="next-actions__filter-link next-actions__filter-link--active"{% else %}class="next-actions__filter-link"{% endif %}>All -- hx-get="/next-actions?context={{ ctx.id }}" hx-target="#next-actions-list" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-push-url="true" {% if selected_context.as_deref() == Some(ctx.id.as_str()) %}aria-current="true" class="next-actions__filter-link next-actions__filter-link--active"{% else %}class="next-actions__filter-link"{% endif %}>{{ ctx.name }} === 2. content.text:
All four items are confirmed present in the committed code at HEAD (db795db):

1. **Filter links have HTMX attrs**: `hx-get`, `hx-target="#next-actions-list"`, `hx-swap="innerHTML"`, `hx-push-url="true"` -- present on both "All" and per-context filter links
2. **Visible label**: `<label for="next-action-context" class="next-actions__context-label">Context</label>` -- present, no `aria-label` on select
3. **Focus management script**: `<script src="/static/js/next-action-focus.js"></script>` -- included in scripts block
4. **Dashboard count**: `{{ next_actions_count }} items` -- dynamic, not hardcoded

Let me also verify the supporting server-side code for the HTMX partial swap and the focus script file exist.

input.command: echo "=== HTMX PARTIAL RESPONSE IN ROUTE ===" && git -C /home/jwilger/projects/todo_list show HEAD:src/routes/next_actions.rs | grep -A5 'if htmx' | head -12 && echo "" && echo "=== LIST TEMPLATE EXISTS ===" && git -C /home/jwilger/projects/todo_list show HEAD:templates/next_action_list.html | head -5 && echo "" && echo "=== FOCUS SCRIPT EXISTS ===" && git -C /home/jwilger/projects/todo_list show HEAD:static/js/next-action-focus.js | head -5 && echo "" && echo "=== DASHBOARD ROUTE USES COUNT ===" && git -C /home/jwilger/projects/todo_list show HEAD:src/routes/dashboard.rs | grep 'next_action' 2>&1
input.description: Verify all supporting code for the 4 blocking items

content.text: Everything is confirmed present and committed. The reviewers may not be seeing the latest code. Let me inform the team-lead with concrete evidence.

input.content:
All four blocking items are already committed and pushed at HEAD (db795db). I have verified each one directly from `git show HEAD:`:

**1. Focus management (Heydon)** -- committed in e2c292e:
- `static/js/next-action-focus.js` exists (152 lines)
- `templates/next_actions.html` includes `<script src="/static/js/next-action-focus.js"></script>`

**2. Visible label (Heydon)** -- committed in e2c292e:
- `templates/next_actions.html` has `<label for="next-action-context" class="next-actions__context-label">Context</label>`
- No `aria-label` attribute on the select element

**3. Dashboard count (Marty)** -- committed in db795db:
- `src/routes/dashboard.rs` calls `next_action_service::count_active_next_actions()`
- `templates/dashboard.html` renders `{{ next_actions_count }} items`

**4. Filter partial swap (Carson)** -- committed in e2c292e:
- Filter links have `hx-get="/next-actions"`, `hx-target="#next-actions-list"`, `hx-swap="innerHTML"`, `hx-push-url="true"`
- Route handler detects HTMX requests and returns `NextActionListTemplate` fragment
- `templates/next_action_list.html` exists as the partial template

The reviewers may be looking at an older commit or cached version. Could you ask them to check `git log --oneline -4` to confirm they are reviewing commits e2c292e and db795db? All changes are pushed and CI is green on run 21966145980.
